LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- PETITIONER'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD DENIED -- INSUFFICIENT SERVICE UNDER CCP 1290.4. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $6111.45. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT RAWLS, MILDRED $6,111.45 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,111.45, SEE SCANNED DOC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $927.60 INTEREST, $227.55 COSTS, M/D: FEB. 2, 2004 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC.

calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert D. Resner, Esq. 334-0796 for Plaintiff and moving party

Tentative ruling adopted -- NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE's petition to confirm arbitration award granted in the amount of $6111.45. Order signed in open court. Mr. Resner requested attorneys fees and costs which are not part of the arbitration award and therefore counsel was directed to bring a formal noticed motion to recover these fees and costs. (JJM/cl) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Memorandum Of P/A And Declaration In Support Of Motion; Proof Of Service; Proposed Order And Judgment
Off Calendar May-29-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Petitioner's motion to confirm arbitration award denied -- insufficient service under CCP 1290.4. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

& Ntc Of Mtn Of Petnr To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: N O A P P E A R A N C E on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff's petition to confirm arbitration award is Denied -- failure to comply with CRC 317. (JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
